source_title: Survey of metals in commercial infant foods, infant formula and non-infant specific foods
n_text: FSA/Fera Table 3 reports commercial infant-food category means; the fruit-based foods and dishes category N is not reported in Table 3.
quote_trace: Fruit based foods and dishes: Al 1125; Sb 0-3; As 9; iAs 1-4; Cd 2-3; Cr 43-54; Cu 862; I 22-27; Fe 7543; Pb 1-3; Mn 2436; Hg 0-1; Ni 92-117; Se 6-7; Sn 43-50; Zn 4993-5002 ug/kg.
